title: Knowledge Persistence Architectures for AI-Based Coding Agents: A Systematic Literature Review Replication Package
description: Replication package for a systematic literature review (PRISMA 2020) on knowledge persistence architectures for AI-based coding agents. Contains the protocol, search strategy (with formal Boolean strings and PRISMA-S compliance table), raw search API responses (Scopus, arXiv, Semantic Scholar citation chasing), BibTeX exports per source, inclusion/exclusion criteria, title/abstract and full-text screening decisions, the 37-field structured extraction schema, compiled extraction data for 28 included studies, per-paper JSON files, the thematic synthesis matrix, and the PRISMA 2020 flow diagram source.

creators.name: Zatti, Alexandre
creators.affiliation: Programa de Pós-Graduação em Computação Aplicada, Universidade Federal da Fronteira Sul
